scenes.text:
You circle the doorway and find a second opening smaller, hidden behind roots — an old servant’s entrance. But a ward hums across it.
You can:
  • Use the signet ring to weaken the ward.
  • Try the lock if you recruited Moth.
  • Force it with the sword and take the damage.

The stone is cold. The symbol glows when you touch it.
The wall doesn’t open — it breathes.
You step through, and the world ends.
Darkness. Not night-dark. Something older. Something that eats light.
Ahead, a girl’s voice: a lullaby your mother used to hum. Elara. Close.
Something else is with her.
